problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: Liquid crystal elastomer actuation may resolve What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
